content.en:
"The master of the Eternal Dao Cultivation of the Ancient Realm, who has built the Eternal Ancient Kingdom for countless years, such a strong man has fallen like this!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

However, this is also the self-inflicted of the lord of the ancient kingdom.

However, he also understands the despair of the Ogu Lord, but the understanding is understanding, the Ogu Lord really deserves to die.

"If it hadn't been for me, I'm afraid the Lord of the Ogu Kingdom would really have planned to succeed!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It can only be said that the Lord of the Ao Gu Kingdom was too unlucky, he met him, and his true identity was spied on by his copy body, otherwise even if he was seen by other Eternal Dao Realms, and he didn't know his identity, it would be impossible to report it directly to the Nine Extremes Alliance.

If you just report that you were being chased and killed by a strange Eternal Dao Realm, you can only ask a slightly stronger Eternal Dao Realm to make a move, and it is impossible for Qin He and other existences to come over. If you are "940", it will be too late at all, and you will not be able to find the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom.

......

Luoxia Court.

Luo Wushuang and Xinghai are back, and Luo Shen City is fine, but the Lord of Luo Shen City is dead, and the Lord of Ao Gu is dead.

The point is that the crime of the Lord of the Ao Gu Kingdom was announced, leaving Luo Wushuang and Xinghai stunned.

Unexpectedly, it was the Lord of Ogu who attacked Roselle City that day, and they were almost wiped out by the Lord of Agu!

Although they didn't know the details, this matter must have something to do with Ye Tian.

Of course, they didn't ask much.

Another period of time passed, and the news came that all the creatures of the Ancient Realm were about to move into the Ancient Cloud Realm and other nearby realms.

Hearing this news, Ye Tian was a little confused.

But soon, he found that the major forces were moving the treasure lands and moving the cities one by one, and he was not ready to stay in the Agu Kingdom at all.

He asked Luo Wushuang and Xinghai about them, but they didn't know, they only knew that this was an order conveyed by some big people who were still in power in the Agu Kingdom, and if they were unwilling to leave, they would pay the consequences.

......

Nine Extremes Void.

Ye Tian and Xue He met here.

"Brother Ye Tian is amazing, he directly knocked down the Lord of the Ao Gu Kingdom!"

Xue He said with a smile.

"It was the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom who chased and killed me, and I was also helpless to report it, but as a result, I ushered in the Qin River, and then I knew that the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom died and rioted in the abyss of the demon seed, devouring ten thousand Eternal Dao Realm to cultivate the Eternal Devouring Technique, which led to his killing. It can only be said that the lord of the Agu Kingdom will die by himself!"

Ye Tiandao.

Immediately, he asked again, "Brother Xuehe, I'm a little curious, why did you let all the creatures of the Ancient Ancient Realm relocate to the Ancient Cloud Realm and other realms?"

Xue Daodao: "Brother Ye Tian should not have been cultivating for too long, and he has not seen the picture of the collapse of the Eternal Realm! Because the Aug Ancient Realm is about to collapse, the treasure land here will become a land of death, and no resources will be born, and even death energy will be born, devouring the earth, even if it is an Eternal Dao powerhouse, it is difficult to cultivate in such an environment, and the Myth to the Dao Realm will not be able to stay for long." Although we can survive here, we have to go in such a harsh environment. "

"Why is this happening?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Xuehe explained: "This is because the Eternal Kingdom is not established casually, and the Eternal Kingdom Decree must be obtained before an Eternal Kingdom can be built. And the Lord of the Eternal Kingdom obtained an Eternal Decree in the first place, which was able to open up the Eternal Kingdom in this land of death. The Eternal Decree can be passed on, and if the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom inherits this Eternal Decree to other Eternal Dao Realms, then the Eternal Realm will not collapse. However, the first time he was caught, he self-destructed the Eternal State Order. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Immediately, Ye Tian said again: "Is the Liuli Mountain where Brother Xuehe is located also going to be relocated to Guyun Mountain?"

"No, we're ready to relocate to the kingdom of the gods. The Agu Kingdom is not suitable for the development of our Liuli Mountain, so it is better to take this opportunity to go directly to the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods. Xue He said.

Ye Tian chatted with Xuehe for a while, and then dispersed.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian also told Xinghai and Luo Wushuang the news of the collapse of the Auggu Kingdom, and they naturally wanted to relocate.

Due to the long distance, he had to choose to relocate to the nearest Guyun Country.

In the following years, Luo Wushuang and Xinghai could only choose to take away many of Luoxia Pavilion's industries one by one, and some ore veins could only forcibly dig up an area, and then slowly mine them in the future.

In this way, Luo Xia Pavilion took some time to deal with the industry, and then began to move to the ancient cloud country......

After a period of time, Luo Xia Pavilion finally arrived in the ancient cloud country, but it could only follow Luo Shen City on the edge of the remote country of the ancient cloud country and place it here.

Bang!!!!!!

The huge Roselle City was put down by Ye Tian, and then the major forces put down the industries everywhere.

And in the following years, Ye Tian also helped to relocate many giant cities, peaks, and treasures in the Auggu Kingdom, which was also the task of the Nine Extremes Alliance.

Of course, the Nine Poles Alliance will also give some Nine Pole Points as a reward.

this day.

The relocation of the Agu Kingdom is almost over, and there are still many creatures who feel that nothing has happened and don't want to move away, so let them be.

......

The edge of the ancient cloud kingdom.

Ye Tian sat here, staring at the Agu Kingdom.

This huge country, which was full of vitality and contained a lot of energy, was actually crumbling little by little under his gaze, countless death energies emerged and processed, and the colorful world seemed to turn gray in an instant, losing all color.

Ye Tian stepped into this area, the energy here had been devoured, everything had come to naught, and the strange aura of death around him was constantly pouring in, which was not suitable for cultivation at all.

"It's suitable for the demon seed!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Perhaps the Demon Seed Abyss is a special mutation place in this environment, suitable for the Demon Seed, but many treasures have been born.

But here 4.0 is really nothing, let alone the birth of resource treasures.

"I don't know if I can build a human kingdom here in the future!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But the Eternal Decree is definitely not easy to obtain, otherwise they all want to build a kingdom and become the lord of a country.

Soon.

He saw some Eternal Daoist powerhouses shuttling from the collapsed Eternal Realm to enter the Guyun Realm.

Obviously, they really believe it now, and they don't dare to stay in the Agu realm anymore.

Of course.

Most of the creatures of the Ancient Cloud Realm have entered the Ancient Cloud Realm, which naturally causes the dissatisfaction of many forces in the Ancient Cloud Realm, which is tantamount to squeezing their resources!

Therefore, there will definitely be no less conflicts in the future.
